subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have revealed that which none knoweth save whom God willeth, and in a certain station have We revealed verses in such manner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نزلنا مره ما لایعرفه احد الا من شاء الله و فی مقام نزلنا الایات علی شان
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
